prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: NPT-TOMPEACEPPIPE-BRN Product Type: AXE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Tomahawk Peace Pipe Stainless Steel Axe 19 In Leather Wrapped Handle Description: Add some flare to your knives and blades collection with the ASR Outdoor 19" Tomahawk Peace Pipe.

This unique axe has two different functions. It features a real tomahawk blade constructed of durable stainless steel that wont rust, and it also works as a classic peace pipe. It comes with a leather wrapped handle that gives it an authentic look will providing comfort and grip while in use.

The axe head itself features a 4 inch blade, and both the head and the pipe are attached securely to the wooden handle. The overall 19 inch length makes it a great size to display on your mantle or in a display case in your home. It also comes with a lanyard and real feathers to complete the look. This replica peace pipe is a must-have addition to any weapon collection. Search Terms: indian peace pipe hemp smoking tobacco decorative blades throwing ax wrapped blade stainless steel tomahawk camping hatchet Features: - DUAL FUNCTION - Traditional Style Tomahawk Doubles as Real Working Piece Pipe | Great for Collectors - DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - Axe Head and Pipe Made of Stainless Steel that Wont Rust - LEATHER WRAPPED HANDLE - Wooden Handle Wrapped for Added Comfort and Grip - TRADITIONAL FEATHER DECORATIONS - The beautifully attached feather decorations give this display tomahawk additional flair and an authentic look - DISPLAY SIZE - 19" Length is Perfect Size for Mantle or Glass Case Display === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
